name: Joey's Grilled Hamburger Supreme
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute mushrooms in 2 tablespoons of butter until they are golden brown.
2. Mix ground beef with spices thoroughly.
3. Fashion the mixture into thin patties, each about 1/4 inch thick and approximately 5 inches in diameter, as they will shrink slightly after grilling.
4. Grill the patties to your desired doneness.
5. Garnish with mushrooms, tomatoes, sharp cheddar cheese, and lettuce.
6. Serve on an onion roll. Purple onion slices are optional for those who enjoy a sweeter flavor.
7. Enjoy this flavorful hamburger supreme with family and friends.
